title: Microsoft responds to LG monitors installing McAfee ads on Windows
summary: LG Monitor App Installer’s description on the Microsoft Store states that the app is for users to “easily install and use apps supported by your monitor through LG Monitor App Installer” and lists McAfee as one of those apps.
caption: output/2026-07-23/microsoft-responds-to-lg-monitors-installing-mcafee-ads-on-windows.txt
